# opnsense_openvpn_client_overwrite (Resource)

Client-specific overrides applied by an OpenVPN server when a client with a matching common name connects (e.g. fixed tunnel address, pushed routes, DNS).

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Pin a specific tunnel address to a client connecting with this common name.
resource "opnsense_openvpn_client_overwrite" "alice" {
  common_name    = "alice"
  description    = "Alice — static tunnel IP"
  tunnel_network = "10.10.20.10/24"
  push_reset     = false

  dns_servers = ["10.10.20.1"]
  dns_domain  = ["example.lan"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `common_name` (String) Client common name to match. Wildcards are not allowed; use one resource per common name.

### Optional

- `block` (Boolean) When `true`, blocks this client from connecting. Defaults to `false`.
- `description` (String) Description of this override. Defaults to `""`.
- `dns_domain` (Set of String) Push DNS domains to the client. Defaults to `[]`.
- `dns_domain_search` (Set of String) Push DNS search domains to the client. Defaults to `[]`.
- `dns_servers` (Set of String) Push DNS servers to the client. Defaults to `[]`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this override. Defaults to `true`.
- `local_networks` (Set of String) Local IPv4/IPv6 networks accessible from this client (CIDR). Defaults to `[]`.
- `ntp_servers` (Set of String) Push NTP servers to the client. Defaults to `[]`.
- `push_reset` (Boolean) When `true`, sends `push-reset` so the client ignores any server-pushed options not explicitly redefined here. Defaults to `false`.
- `redirect_gateway` (Set of String) OpenVPN `redirect-gateway` flags to push. Any of `local`, `autolocal`, `def1`, `bypass-dhcp`, `bypass-dns`, `block-local`, `ipv6`, `!ipv4`. Defaults to `[]`.
- `register_dns` (Boolean) Push `register-dns` so Windows clients refresh DNS settings. Defaults to `false`.
- `remote_networks` (Set of String) Remote networks reachable behind this client (CIDR), pushed as iroute. Defaults to `[]`.
- `route_gateway` (String) Override the default route gateway for this client. Defaults to `""`.
- `servers` (Set of String) UUIDs of the OpenVPN server instances this override applies to. When empty, the override applies to all servers. Defaults to `[]`.
- `tunnel_network` (String) IPv4 tunnel network to assign this client (CIDR notation). Defaults to `""`.
- `tunnel_network_v6` (String) IPv6 tunnel network to assign this client (CIDR notation). Defaults to `""`.
- `wins_servers` (Set of String) Push WINS servers to the client. Defaults to `[]`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the override.
